---
title: "Feb 27 Activity"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-27"
runtime: shiny
---

```{r}
set.seed(123)

event_types <- c("Concert", "Talk", "Workshop", "Festival")
dates <- seq.Date(as.Date("2024-01-01"), as.Date("2024-06-30"), by = "day")

eda_events <- data.frame(
  EventID = 1:180,
  EventDate = sample(dates, 180, replace = TRUE),
  EventType = sample(event_types, 180, replace = TRUE,
                     prob = c(0.35, 0.25, 0.25, 0.15)),
  VenueCapacity = sample(seq(80, 1500, by = 20), 180, replace = TRUE),
  DurationHours = round(runif(180, 1, 6), 1),
  TicketPrice = round(runif(180, 0, 50), 2)
)

# Attendance: capped by capacity, skewed, with drop-off
eda_events$Attendance <- round(
  pmin(
    eda_events$VenueCapacity,
    rlnorm(180, meanlog = log(eda_events$VenueCapacity * 0.6), sdlog = 0.4)
  )
)

# Satisfaction: nonlinear + noisy
eda_events$SatisfactionScore <- round(
  65 +
    6 * log(eda_events$DurationHours) -
    0.15 * eda_events$TicketPrice +
    ifelse(eda_events$EventType == "Festival", 8, 0) +
    rnorm(180, 0, 10),
  1
)

# Clamp satisfaction to 0–100
eda_events$SatisfactionScore <-
  pmax(pmin(eda_events$SatisfactionScore, 100), 0)

str(eda_events)
summary(eda_events)
```



## Interactive Visualizaton
```{r}
library(plotly)

plot_ly(
  data = eda_events,
  x = ~Attendance,
  y = ~SatisfactionScore,
  type = "scatter",
  mode = "markers",
  color = ~EventType,
  text = ~paste(
    "Event Type:", EventType,
    "<br>Attendance:", Attendance,
    "<br>Satisfaction:", SatisfactionScore
  ),
  hoverinfo = "text"
)

```


##Mini Dashboard

##Geographical Mapping

##Short reflection (5–7 sentences)
